meta.title: The Future of the Middle East: Regional Scenarios Beyond the
meta.description: Hudson Institute hosted a panel featuring Shmuel Bar, Michael Doran, Hillel Fradkin, and Lee Smith to explore U.S. policy in the Middle East with respect to regional strategy for the next two, five, ten, and twenty-five years. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
